body.title: Fix reading pipeline stall — queue corruption, missing trigger
body.result: Cleaned corrupted queue, added hourly cron, tested pipeline restart
body.description: learn_queue.json corrupted with trace:// URLs since Apr 8. drain_learn_queue idle. PROC_READING_FEEDER habit missing — no hourly trigger. Fix: clean queue, create hourly trigger, prevent trace:// recurrence. 349 books pending.
